title: Project Engineer[Chemical System/Tool Utilities Hook-up/ semiconductor or cleanroom companies will be highly considered]
description:
Job Responsibilities:

  1. Periodically manage, review, and update detailed building system reports (tagging database) and their impact lists in collaboration with customers.
  2. Read, understand, and develop basic isometric drawings, P&ID, and PFD drawings using AutoCAD software.
  3. Independently work on assigned project tasks with the engineering team, project owners, and subcontractors/suppliers.
  4. Coordinate with lower-tier subcontractors and suppliers to ensure on-time delivery, cost efficiency, quality, and safety performance.
  5. Prepare Bill of Quantities (BQ) materials, work permit applications, and documentation/drawing submissions as per project requirements.
  6. Assist the Project Manager in coordinating, monitoring, and controlling project execution, schedule, cost, and scope baselines.
  7. Ensure compliance with quality standards and all health & safety requirements as per client and company policies.
  8. Perform additional ad-hoc duties as assigned by the Project Manager.

Job Requirements:

  1. Minimum Diploma in Mechanical/Mechatronics Engineering or equivalent.
  2. Prior experience in chemical distribution systems, waste chemical systems, or slurry systems for wafer fabrication is advantageous.
  3. Technical knowledge of ultrapure piping/tubing components, fittings installation, and cleanroom utilities hook-up construction (e.g., Bulk & Specialty Gas, Exhaust, UPW, Drain).
  4. Proficient in AutoCAD for drawing development.
  5. Skilled in Microsoft Excel for data entry and updates.
  6. At least 1 year of experience in microelectronics, semiconductor, or cleanroom factory automation environments is preferred.
  7. Driven, responsible, and mature team player with a positive learning and work attitude.
  8. Strong interpersonal, communication (verbal/written), and organizational skills.

postedCompany.description:
Linkedcorp is a professional recruitment firm specializing in providing comprehensive talent solutions. Our services range from general staffing, executive search, temporary & contract hiring, project hiring, and HR outsourcing services, ensuring that we are equipped to meet the diverse needs of organizations of all sizes. With a team of experienced and knowledgeable professionals, we are committed to delivering results that exceed expectations and help companies achieve their strategic goals.  


Our commitment to excellence and delivering value to our clients sets us apart in the industry. We are dedicated to building long-term partnerships and providing a positive experience to all of our clients. Whether you're looking to expand your team or take your company to the next level, LinkedCorp is the partner you can trust to help you achieve your goals.
